name: Android APK AAB

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20

      - name: Setup Java
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: 17

      - name: Install Dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Build Web
        run: npm run build

      - name: Install Capacitor
        run: |
          npm install @capacitor/core@5
          npm install @capacitor/cli@5
          npm install @capacitor/android@5

      - name: Capacitor Init
        run: |
          npx cap init FeiraLivre com.feiralivre.app --web-dir dist

      - name: Add Android
        run: npx cap add android

      - name: Sync Android
        run: npx cap sync android

      - name: Fix Gradle
        run: |
          echo "org.gradle.jvmargs=-Xmx2048m" >> android/gradle.properties

      - name: Permission
        run: chmod +x android/gradlew

      - name: Build APK
        run: |
          cd android
          ./gradlew assembleDebug --stacktrace

      - name: Build AAB
        run: |
          cd android
          ./gradlew bundleRelease --stacktrace

      - name: Upload APK
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: app-debug-apk
          path: android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk

      - name: Upload AAB
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: app-release-aab
          path: android/app/build/outputs/bundle/release/app-release.aab
